summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 open maintainer-owned PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard has no shared canonical, merge/fix actions are blocked, low-signal closeout is disabled, and several items require security routing or maintainer/product review before any closure or merge path.

MCP Apps host support crosses gateway/session/security-boundary concerns and must route to central security handling.
RFC/design PR needs maintainer product direction, not dedupe closeout.
Hook history/window handling is marked security-sensitive by live preflight and must route to central security handling.
Docs draft should remain open for maintainer review; no safe closure basis exists.
